# Pipedream

> AI Registry entry [AIR-78](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-78/pipedream) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-21. Departments: ai-office.

**Category:** Workflow Automation / API Integration Platform
**Cost:** Free; Basic $29; Advanced $49; Connect $49; Business custom
**Departments:** AI Policy
**Entity:** Workday-acquired (Nov 2025), HQ San Francisco. Open source (11k GitHub stars).

## Overview

Developer-focused workflow automation and API integration platform. Connects 3,000+ apps. Low-code/code-first builder. AI agent deployment. Trusted by 1M+ developers, startups to Fortune 500. MCP server: 3,000+ APIs, 10,000+ tools for AI agent integration.

## Key Products

* **Workflow Builder** — visual + code-based, HTTP/webhook/schedule/email/app events triggers
* **AI Agent Builder (String)** — prompt/run/edit/deploy AI agents with built-in AI tokens
* **Pipedream Connect** — SDK for embedded integrations with managed OAuth
* **MCP Server** — mcp.pipedream.com — 3,000+ APIs, 10,000+ tools
* Data/File Stores for workflow state
* Git Sync — bidirectional GitHub for workflow version control
* Custom Domains, VPC support (Enterprise)

## Integrations

* 3,000+ apps including Drive, Sheets, Slack, Linear, Notion, Airtable, AWS, HubSpot, Salesforce, Stripe, OpenAI, Anthropic
* REST API, CLI
* Webhooks
* Zapier alternative with code-level control

## Security

* SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA (Business with BAA)
* Annual pen testing
* AWS hosted, WAF, GuardDuty, CloudTrail
* SSO + SCIM (Business plan)

## Strategic Significance

MCP server (3,000+ APIs, 10,000+ tools) could serve as central integration backbone connecting Janus's approved tool stack to AI agents. Workday acquisition adds long-term vendor stability.

## Considerations

* SSO/SCIM Business plan only — custom pricing
* Workday acquisition may affect future pricing/terms/direction
* AI Agent builder (String) relatively new — maturity TBD
* Credit-based pricing requires usage forecasting
* Overlap with Zapier/Make/n8n in registry

*Evaluating. AI Office Infrastructure tier.*
